title: Oshkosh, WI — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Oshkosh, WI: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Oshkosh is a city in WI with a population of 67,000. Home of the EAA AirVenture Oshkosh and the University of Wisconsin-Oshkosh.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
